categories.description: CRITICAL P0. The double-entry ledger is unbalanced — a transaction or a global tenant-account sum shows SUM(debits) != SUM(credits). New transactions are halted until an ops-authored fix lands. Includes scope (per-transaction / per-account-daily / global-tenant), affected account or transaction, imbalance amount, and the reconciler run that detected it.

A manual ledger correction was applied — an admin invoked the transaction reversal endpoint with reversal_reason='accounting_adjustment'. Every fire is a regulator-visible signal. Includes the original transaction, the offsetting reversal transaction, the actor, and the required justification note.

A ledger account balance crossed a configured threshold — e.g. accounts_receivable > $50k (collection risk); cash < $1k (liquidity risk); refunds_owed > $10k (needs disbursement). Includes the account, current balance, threshold kind (high/low watermark), and the transaction that caused the crossing.

The tenant's monthly General Ledger (GL) report is ready — per-account opening balance + all posted transactions + closing balance + total debits + total credits for the closed month. Delivered as accountant-shaped CSV + JSONL. Medium+ tier (requires transaction_advanced_reporting entitlement).
